# Fitness Field Notes

> A minimalist workout tracking web application for intermediate lifters who value simplicity.

## Overview

Fitness Field Notes is a gym journal and workout log application that helps users:
- Create custom workout templates with exercises, sets, reps, and rest times
- Track workout sessions and log progress over time
- Build multi-workout training programs
- Share workouts publicly or privately with friends
- Export workouts to PDF for printing

## Target Audience

Intermediate lifters who prefer simplicity and minimalism over complex features. Users who want a digital replacement for a paper gym journal.

## Key Features

### Workout Builder
Create workout templates with exercise groups. Add exercises with sets, reps, weight, and rest times. Organize exercises into supersets or circuits.

### Workout Mode
Active session tracking with rest timers, set completion tracking, and exercise logging. Record actual weights and reps during your workout.

### Programs
Combine multiple workouts into complete training programs. Schedule workouts across weeks.

### Public Workouts
Browse community-shared workout templates. Find push/pull/legs splits, strength programs, HIIT workouts, and more. Save workouts to your personal library.

### Workout Sharing
Generate shareable links for your workouts. Share privately with training partners or publicly with the community.

## Public Content

- `/` - Home page with app overview
- `/launch` - Marketing landing page
- `/public-workouts` - Browse all shared workout templates
- `/share/{token}` - View individual shared workouts

## Keywords

gym log, workout journal, workout planner, workout builder, fitness tracker, workout tracker, training log, exercise log, gym journal, strength training log, workout templates

## Technical Details

- Web application accessible at https://fitnessfieldnotes.com
- Works on desktop and mobile browsers
- Free tier with local storage, premium tier with cloud sync
- No app download required - works in browser

## Contact

Website: https://fitnessfieldnotes.com
